summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chalet & Stay Configurator iteration 17. All 19 backend API tests passed - 26 models total (17 chalets + 9 glamping), 4 suppliers (Kunert 8, Arcabo 6, BBS 3, Campsolutions 9). All frontend features working: Categorie filter (Alles/Chalets/Glamping), Leverancier filter (4 suppliers), pricing display, tent/building icons, Samenstellen tab with different options for glamping vs chalet.
passed_tests: Wood Lodge Junior (Campsolutions) pricing: €3.236 / €3.916 incl BTW / €58 lease ✓
Frontend: Clicking 'Chalet & Stay' opens ChaletWizard with Categorie/Leverancier/Bestemming filters
Frontend: Clicking 'Glamping' category shows 9 Campsolutions models with tent icon
Frontend: Clicking 'Chalets' category shows 17 models from Kunert/Arcabo/BBS
Frontend: Clicking Campsolutions supplier filter shows only their 9 models
Frontend: Geselecteerd shows supplier name, max personen, model_vorm + dak_vorm
Frontend: Glamping models get tent icon, chalet models get building icon
Frontend: Samenstellen tab shows Sanitair/Inrichting/Vlonder for glamping models
Frontend: Samenstellen tab shows Keuken/Badkamer/Terras/Interieur/Klimaat/Duurzaamheid for chalet models
Frontend: Back to flows button returns to homepage
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - 26 chalet/glamping models defined in chalet_engine.py CHALET_MODELS constant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested expanded Chalet & Stay Configurator. Key findings: 1) 26 models from 4 suppliers: Kunert Group (8 chalets), Arcabo (6 chalets), BBS Systeembouw (3 vakantiewoningen), Campsolutions (9 glamping tents). 2) New Categorie filter: Alles/Chalets/Glamping. 3) New Leverancier filter: Alle/Kunert/Arcabo/BBS/Campsolutions. 4) Glamping models (Campsolutions) have tent icon, chalets have building icon. 5) Samenstellen tab shows different options: glamping gets Sanitair/Inrichting/Vlonder/Verlichting, chalets get Keuken/Badkamer/Terras/Interieur/Klimaat/Duurzaamheid. 6) Pricing verified: Plat 12 = €74.950/€90.690/€1.349, Wood Lodge Junior = €3.236/€3.916/€58. 7) All filters working: categorie, supplier_id, bestemming, dak_vorm, model_vorm, oppervlakte slider.
